## Regulations Checklist
<!-- Ensure that your code adheres to the following regulations. -->
- [ ] I used the [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) format for my commit messages.
- [ ] My feature is properly documented in the docstrings.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.

## Notices Checklist
<!-- Let us know if your code contains any of the following notices. -->
- [ ] I applied *type hints* to my code.
- [ ] My implementation does NOT introduce any new warnings or errors.
  - [ ] I have added tests to ensure that my feature works as expected.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] My code does NOT contain any sensitive information or secrets.
- [ ] I have ensured that my code does NOT violate any intellectual property rights or licenses.
